developed by an all-female team of designers and food scientists, droplet draws from scientifically-backed plant magic to help you fight stress and feel balanced without any harmful ingredients.

self-care sampler

try all three of our signature flavors. Each sampler includes this month’s edition of our wellness guide. free shipping for a limited time only.

Free shipping for a year when you purchase a subscription + save 10% off of cases!

get yours
 
 

better ingredients

Ice cream science meets plant magic—every flavor was made with an intention in mind. There’s a droplet for every mood/moment.

  • Adaptogens are non-toxic herbs + botanicals that help the human body adapt to stress.

    What ancient herbalists knew, modern science has confirmed. These aren’t your typical home remedies, these are science-backed natural bio-regulators! Read on for a list of our favorite adaptogens and superfoods and learn more about how they can help you bring balance to your life.

  • why drink "flavorings" when you can have the real thing? droplet is made with real fruit so you can receive nature’s intended nutritional benefits in an elevated, wholesome beverage.

  • no more monkfruit mouth— we’re the only beverage made with unprocessed organic coconut nectar, tapped straight from the tree. No cane sugars, no erythritol, just natural sweetness from our fruits and a touch of sweet from our coconut nectar.

 
 

Droplet’s mission is to bring joy and nutritional value to your daily self-care routine. From the artwork on our packaging to the intentions behind the flavors, we hope to inspire you to live your healthiest life with the help of our products.

Droplet’s mission is to bring joy and nutritional value to your daily self-care routine. From the artwork on our packaging to the intentions behind the flavors, we hope to inspire women everywhere to live their healthiest lives with the help of our products.

Droplet’s mission is to bring joy and nutritional value to your daily self-care routine. From the artwork on our packaging to the intentions behind the flavors, we hope to inspire women everywhere to live their healthiest lives with the help of our products.

 

fresh with a purpose

Our formulas and ingredients are minimally processed and free of artificial chemicals, which is what we feel is most beneficial for the environment and our bodies. We use only fresh fruit and the finest organic and/or wildcrafted extracts to create our beverages, which may lead to very slight variations in color or flavor from batch to batch. Just like flowers, no two are identical— but each has its own beauty.

Here is a current list of every ingredient in our drinks:

 
Ingredient Origin Purpose
Ashwagandha India Adaptogen
Cacao France Aromatherapy
Coconut Nectar Thailand Natural Sweetener
Ginger California Superfood
Himalayan Pink Sea Salt Pakistan Electrolytes
Lemon Juice California Natural Preservative
Lemon Verbena France Aromatherapy
Moringa India Superfood
Passion Fruit Vietnam Superfood
Reishi Mushroom China Adaptogen
Rhodiola Canada Adaptogen
White Peach California Whole Fruit
Vanilla Bean Madagascar Aromatherapy
Yuzu Japan Aromatherapy
 
 

⋆ our story ☽

A new (but old) way to deal with stress


When we first experienced the benefits of adaptogens, we were going through some of the most stressful times in our own lives. We were simply amazed by the effects these wünderplants had on our health. We had more energy, more focus, and we were able to manage stress with ease. It was truly a game-changer. We know that sometimes it’s hard to find time to be healthy, especially when life is happening so fast. By combining these health-promoting ingredients with the simple indulgence of a delicious sparkling beverage, we hope to make it easier for you to take care of yourself. droplet’s mission is to bring joy and nutritional value to your daily self-care routine. From the artwork on our packaging to the intentions behind the flavors, we hope to inspire women everywhere to live their healthiest lives with the help of our products.

- celeste xo

 

meet our founder

 

Celeste Perez
